title_en: Prayer for Good in This World and the Hereafter
arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
latin: Rabbanā ātina fid-dunyā ḥasanataw wa fil-ākhirati ḥasanataw wa qinā ‘adhāban-nār.
translation_id: Ya Tuhan kami, berilah kami kebaikan di dunia dan kebaikan di akhirat, dan lindungilah kami dari azab neraka.
translation_en: Our Lord, give us in this world [that which is] good and in the Hereafter [that which is] good and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّكَ عَفُوٌّ تُحِبُّ الْعَفْوَ فَاعْفُ عَنِّي
translation_id: Ya Allah, sesungguhnya Engkau Maha Pemaaf dan Engkau mencintai maaf, maka maafkanlah aku.
translation_en: O Allah, indeed You are Pardoning, and You love pardon, so pardon me.

arabic: لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي كُنْتُ مِنَ الظَّالِمِينَ
latin: Lā ilāha illā anta subḥānaka innī kuntu minaẓ-ẓālimīn.
translation_id: Tidak ada tuhan selain Engkau, Maha Suci Engkau. Sungguh, aku termasuk orang-orang yang zalim.
translation_en: There is no deity except You; exalted are You. Indeed, I have been of the wrongdoers.

title_id: Doa Keteguhan Hati di Atas Agama
arabic: يَا مُقَلِّبَ الْقُلُوبِ ثَبِّتْ قَلْبِي عَلَى دِينِكَ
translation_id: Wahai Dzat yang membolak-balikkan hati, teguhkanlah hatiku di atas agama-Mu.
translation_en: O Changer of the hearts, make my heart firm upon Your religion.

arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْهُدَى وَالتُّقَى وَالْعَفَافَ وَالْغِنَى
latin: Allāhumma innī as'alukal-hudā wat-tuqā wal-'afāfa wal-ghinā.
translation_id: Ya Allah, sesungguhnya aku memohon kepada-Mu petunjuk, ketakwaan, sifat iffah (menjaga diri dari yang haram), dan kekayaan jiwa (kecukupan).
translation_en: O Allah, I ask You for guidance, piety, chastity, and self-sufficiency.
